---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new pattern, skill, subagent, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What situation is this trying to help with? Who has this problem and what does it cost them today?

Avoid: "It would be nice to have X."
Prefer: "When I do X, Y happens, which costs me Z."

## Proposed solution

What you'd like the template to include. Be specific:

- New file or folder to add
- Change to an existing file
- New skill or subagent
- New pattern in `docs/patterns/`

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve the same problem, and why this one is better.

## Would this stay stack-agnostic?

The template avoids assuming a specific framework, database, or vendor. Does your proposal keep that neutrality?

## Additional context

Screenshots, links, related discussions.

## Checklist

- [ ] I checked existing issues and this hasn't been raised
- [ ] I read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] This would benefit multiple projects, not just mine
